title: Elevate online - worth the watch!

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
The spot-nik team is meeting for an Elevate Online watch party, and we’re having a great time! It’s not too late to join online - or to watch on-demand, and to see what’s new at monday.

And of course, a shameless plug to come hear Noam Lapidot, as he discusses how to use monday.com to manage your inventory more efficiently.

Elevate 2025 by monday.com

Elevate Online 2025 On Demand | Watch Top AI Sessions Anytime

Catch up on Elevate Online 2025 with full on demand access. Explore top AI sessions, keynotes, and monday.com product deep-dives to transform how your team works, all on your time.

watch party 22000×1500 266 KB

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, @sari Holtz

You made some solid points, and I appreciate you taking the time to break everything down so clearly. Thanks for making this information available!
